subcodes.first_line: The Dove hath warbled upon the branches of the Tree of Eternity: "Verily there is none other God but Me, the All-Forgiving, the All-Merciful." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تغرد الورقاء علی افنان دوحه البقاء انه لا اله الا انا الغفور الرحیم قد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Satan; the Evil One, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
